description: Team AI Kit - gentle-ai for teams. Standardizes AI usage across development teams with role-based skills, shared memory, and zero-friction onboarding.
post_install: Write-Host 'Run "team-ai-kit setup" to configure your environment.' -ForegroundColor Cyan
notes: Run 'team-ai-kit setup' to configure your IDE, role, and team repo.
Run 'team-ai-kit doctor' to verify your installation.
Run 'team-ai-kit help' for all available commands.
